vision: Architectural leap from DECORTEX v1.x adapter-over-LLM hacks toward an AI with real long-term memory. Memory is not appended to the model; the model is designed around memory.

v1x_limits: lossy compression: 20 sessions collapsed into 16 state slots + 1 SSM vector + 4 conflict slots
single-layer hook fusion at backbone layer N-k: memory is injected once, not integrated iteratively
static memory at inference: Phase A writes, Phase B reads, no live updates during a conversation
no semantic addressing: memory is cross-attended as a flat block, not queried with structured keys
v2_0_alpha_answers: six explicit memory banks with distinct semantics (state, episode_obj, episode_ssm, conflict, archive, working)
fusion blocks as NATIVE backbone layers, not external hooks; last n_fusion_layers of the stack are FusionBlock
live writer-updater pipeline: each forward pass ingests the hidden state and routes it through gating -> updater -> bank, with nearest-neighbor semantic update on latent keys
query engine produces (q_ent, q_rel, q_typ) latent keys; readers perform NN-semantic attention, not flat cross-attention

core_architectural_principles: Own transformer trained from scratch. No Qwen, no frozen backbone, no hook injection. FusionBlock is a native layer type.
Memory has SIX components: M_state, M_episode_obj, x_t_ep (continuous SSM), M_conflict, M_archive, M_work.

Reader produces FIVE streams: read_state, read_episode_objects, read_episode_ssm, read_conflict, read_archive. Working memory is a sixth stream fused alongside. Episode split (obj + ssm) is sub-fused internally by a dedicated W_theta module before entering global MemoryReadFusion.

Writer routes via gating network over {state, episode_obj, conflict, archive, working, skip}. MemoryUpdater performs nearest-neighbor semantic match on latent keys; s_i > theta_match updates, else allocates new slot.
Conflict memory stores difference vectors, not raw values. Detected when key-similarity is high but value-divergence is high.
Consolidator migrates stable slots state -> archive and merges pairwise similar slots above consolidate_merge_threshold.
EpisodeSSM is trainable: x_t = sigmoid(a) * x_{t-1} + B * phi(u_t), readout r_ssm = C * x_t. State is a buffer that persists across forward passes; detached to prevent cross-turn graph buildup.
Values stored as buffers, keys as latent projections. Grad flow enters through attention weighting over detached keys/values (q -> softmax(q @ k.T) @ v).

demonstrator_scale.rationale: Small-to-medium demonstrator. Scope is proof of architectural principle, not SOTA language modeling. Scale up only after the flow is validated end-to-end.

qwen_role: Qwen is NOT in the forward pass. Qwen remains only as: (a) external baseline for benchmarks, (b) potential teacher for synthetic data generation, (c) comparator. Never imported into the model.
target_platform: Local repository with standard Python package layout. Colab remains available for training runs but is not the primary development environment.
key_constraints: File integrity: never create empty or placeholder files. Every file must contain complete, working content.
Data preservation: never simplify, compress, or delete existing content in project JSON files. Append only.
Language: code/comments/docstrings in English. Conversational replies in Romanian.
No logging module. print() with graceful degradation and status prefixes.
Type annotations mandatory on all function signatures.
verify_integration.py must be runnable and must report real wired/unwired counts before any progress claim.
target_users: Future academic publication on memory-native transformer architectures
